name: AI Video Pipeline — Google Sheet + Mock (Phase 3)

documentId.cachedResultName: Set spreadsheet ID in n8n after import
Set spreadsheet ID in n8n after import

parameters.content:
## Google Sheet = start here

**Sheet columns** (header row): use [templates/google_sheet_columns.csv](../templates/google_sheet_columns.csv).

1. Create a spreadsheet; paste headers. Set **document ID** in **Google Sheets Trigger** and **Update row in sheet** (from URL between `/d/` and `/edit`).
2. Headers: include **sheet_row** — in row 2 put `=ROW()` and fill down so each row has its sheet row number (used to update the row; no manual id needed). Add **topic** (or **prompt**), **status**=`QUEUED`, optional **vendor_base_url**, **max_scenes**.
3. **Credentials:** trigger + **Update row in sheet** use **Google Sheets OAuth2**; **OpenAI Chat Completions** uses **OpenAI API**.
4. **Activate** the workflow; new rows with `QUEUED` run after the next poll.

**Mock URL:** if **n8n runs in Docker**, set **vendor_base_url** to `http://172.17.0.1:8080` (or put that in the sheet column) — `127.0.0.1` points at the n8n container, not your host.

**Update row** matches column **sheet_row** (=ROW value). Headers must match [templates/google_sheet_columns.csv](../templates/google_sheet_columns.csv) exactly (case-sensitive).
